calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-18-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor
Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: M. Vallejo, Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225
Petitioner: Myrna Mohammed, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for Minor: Bernadette Sagario Ore, was sworn and examined.
Application to dispense with notice to minor's father--Order Granted

It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Bernadette Sagario Mohammed
Decree signed in open court.
